text:
The web search confirms that arXiv ID 2406.13163 points to "LLMatDesign: Autonomous Materials Discovery with Large Language Models" (by Shuyi Jia, Chao Zhang, Victor Fung), not the cited paper. No results for the exact title "Swissprot-aug: Augmenting protein function descriptions for language model training" were found anywhere.

VERDICT: LIKELY
EXPLANATION: The arXiv ID 2406.13163 points to a completely different paper ("LLMatDesign: Autonomous Materials Discovery with Large Language Models"), and no paper with the exact title "Swissprot-aug: Augmenting protein function descriptions for language model training" was found in any academic database or via web search. Both the title and the cited ArXiv ID are unverifiable, strongly indicating this reference is fabricated.
LINK: NONE
